annotations.name: DTC1111MU03_offline refund process monitoring standard
annotations.comment_for_signoff:
we are able to create one time customer - 
we are able to post billing document on one time customer account 
we able to update consumer bank details, remove payment block and send to payment run (functionality on our side is working)
 --> remaining E2E process is pending for validation (Source2Pay/Treasury pending for validation)

annotations.name: Sale Mixed Basket

But if this is tested in the other pure book sale case it would be sufficient
